name: Jade Chen
aboutpara:
I am a data scientist with a background in behavioural neuroscience.
I specialize in statistical analysis, predictive modeling, and data visualization using Python, R, and SQL.

Outside of data, I enjoy rock climbing and have spent several summers climbing across Canada, the US, France, and Spain.
However, my recent obsession is beach volleyball!

Fun fact: I worked as a pastry chef for over five years.

resume.tagline: 👋 I'm a data scientist and ML engineer at Cohere AI.
resume.description: I specialize in turning messy, complex data into clear insights and reliable models. With roots in behavioral neuroscience and experience across the full ML lifecycle, I bring both scientific rigor and engineering pragmatism to every project.

experiences.bullets: Building and deploying ML models at scale, Statistical analysis and predictive modeling, Data pipeline development and maintenance

education.universityPara: Background in behavioral neuroscience, with focus on statistical methods and data-driven research.
